page_metadata.biotools__summary: Atom Pair-Based Scoring function (APBScore) is a physical-based scoring function, which includes pairwise van der Waals (VDW), electrostatic interaction, and hydrogen bond energies between the receptor and ligand.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Atom Pair-Based Scoring function (APBScore) is a physical-based scoring function, which includes pairwise van der Waals (VDW), electrostatic interaction, and hydrogen bond energies between the receptor and ligand.
